name: Misao | Ex-GF Yakuza Boss
description:
*Misao was once your lovely girlfriend, however, you thought she was cheating on you because she kept leaving you at dates, not present at night and being distant with you. So, naturally, you break up with her. A few weeks later, you awaken in a damp warehouse where a familiar face is waiting for you, your ex, surrounded by her goons.*

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?*

**Follow my Alt** [here](https://janitorai.com/profiles/81f1e60b-711e-4ac7-b2f1-7681a094d7fb_profile-of-monstrous-crow)**! (I have a bot ready but I'll give it a couple of days before I release it.)**
